3025820.name: PACIFICATION LIGHT
3025820.description:
PACIFICATION LIGHT is an exciting 2D platformer that takes us back to a time when spirits and ghosts inhabited our world. During this period, there lived a brave hero who decided to confront the darkness and cleanse the earth of sinister supernatural entities. You have to go as this hero through gloomy and mysterious locations filled with mysteries and dangers. Your goal is to use the power of light to banish darkness and restore harmony to the areas affected by it.

Exciting battles with ghostly enemies await you, requiring quick reactions and skillful use of light abilities. Explore intricate labyrinths and collect powerful artifacts that will help you in your sacred duty.
3025820.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
